heading: Adverse personnel actions
label: 1518 Adverse personnel actions
text: An officer or employee of the United States Government or of the District of Columbia government violating shall be subject to appropriate administrative discipline including, when circumstances warrant, suspension from duty without pay or removal from office.section 1517(a) of this title
